name: @wildwinter/simple-vc-lib
description: An agnostic version control wrapper library for game development tools.
author: Ian Thomas

scripts.build: npx rollup -c && shx cp src/index.d.ts dist/simpleVcLib.d.ts && shx cp ../README.md dist/README.md && shx cp ../LICENSE dist/LICENSE
scripts.perforce-tests: npm run build && npx mocha test/perforce.test.js
scripts.pack: npm run build && shx mkdir -p ../dist/v$npm_package_version && shx rm -rf ../dist/v$npm_package_version/simple-vc-lib-js-v$npm_package_version.zip && zip -r ../dist/v$npm_package_version/simple-vc-lib-js-v$npm_package_version.zip ./dist
scripts.publish-npm: npm run build && shx cp ../README.md ./README.md && shx cp ../LICENSE ./LICENSE && npm publish --access public; shx rm -f ./README.md ./LICENSE
